hero.eyebrow: AI solutions for complex internal processes
hero.h1: We automate compliance, public procurement and internal operations with AI agents
hero.sub: We build AI applications and workflows for validation, completion, reconciliation and document generation, integrated into real business processes.
hero.reassurance: Suitable for processes with documents, validation rules, audit trail and compliance obligations.
whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.importers.title: Importers
whatWeDo.importers.desc: Automation for reporting, validation and CBAM / EUDR compliance.
whatWeDo.public.title: Public procurement
whatWeDo.public.desc: Digital workflow for procurement documents, acquisition files, needs and PAAP.
whatWeDo.operators.title: Economic operators
whatWeDo.operators.desc: Faster identification of compliant equipment for procurement procedures.
whatWeDo.retail.title: Retail / internal operations
whatWeDo.retail.desc: Document reconciliation and exception handling in repetitive processes.
solutions.title: Solutions portfolio
solutions.cbam.desc: Automation for collecting, validating and preparing data required in CBAM processes.
solutions.eudr.desc: Support for EUDR processes, document traceability and organizing compliance data.
solutions.epaap.desc: Platform for public institutions dedicated to managing the workflow of completing and validating procurement documents, building acquisition files, collecting needs and generating / updating PAAP.
solutions.findequip.desc: Solution for economic operators participating in public procurement procedures who need to identify equipment compliant with requirements.
solutions.retail.desc: Automation for internal document reconciliation and exception handling.
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1.title: We analyze the existing process
howItWorks.step1.desc: We understand the workflow, documents and rules you already use.
howItWorks.step2.title: We identify decision points
howItWorks.step2.desc: We map the rules, validations and exceptions in your process.
howItWorks.step3.title: We build the agentic workflow
howItWorks.step3.desc: We create AI interaction with validations, rules and concrete outputs.
howItWorks.step4.title: We integrate and refine
howItWorks.step4.desc: We integrate, validate and refine the solution together with users.
value.title: Where we add value
value.v1: Reducing manual work in repetitive processes
value.v3: Shorter time for completion and verification
value.v4: Better traceability of decisions and changes
demos.title: Demo center
whyUs.title: Why us
whyUs.d1.title: We understand regulated processes
whyUs.d1.desc: We work with documents, validation rules and compliance requirements.
whyUs.d2.title: Solutions for real work
whyUs.d2.desc: We build for operations, not just presentation prototypes.
whyUs.d3.title: We model rules and exceptions
whyUs.d3.desc: We can model validations, escalations and special case handling.
whyUs.d4.title: Product + operational workflow
whyUs.d4.desc: We design the product together with the client's operational workflow.
ctaFinal.title: Let's map the process you want to automate
ctaFinal.sub: We start with your process, documents and rules. From there we define the solution, demo and implementation steps.

about.title: About us
about.intro: We develop AI solutions for automating complex internal processes, focused on compliance, documents, validation and operational decisions.
howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.step1.title: Discovery and process mapping
howWeWork.step1.desc: We understand the existing process, documents, roles and rules involved.
howWeWork.step2.title: Identifying automation points
howWeWork.step2.desc: We analyze where AI can add real value in your workflow.
howWeWork.step3.title: Solution design and prototype
howWeWork.step3.desc: We build a functional prototype based on the mapped process.
howWeWork.step4.title: Implementation and integration
howWeWork.step4.desc: We integrate the solution into your existing work environment.
howWeWork.step5.title: Testing, calibration and rollout
howWeWork.step5.desc: We validate with real users and refine until the desired result.
